Encounter

Spawn conditions
It must be Daytime and Sunny Weather
Requirements / prerequisites (optional)
to tame you need a dragon heart medallion
What happened after defeat?
tamed-or-fled
Can be mounted?
yes
Health (if known)
790
How to tame
Bring the Creature down to about 10% HP, than hand it a Dragon Heard Medallion

Loot & Rewards

Drop rate observation
unknown

Verification

Reproduction steps
1. Find the Creature in the Pinewoods on the day while the weather is sunny 2. Attack the Creature and bring it down to about 10% of its HP, then it will get stunned 3. use the Item "Dragon Heart Medallion" on the Creature 4. it will now follow you around and you can ride it and fly with it.
Observed result
The Dragon was tamed an can be used as a mount
Expected result
unclear
Automation tags (optional)
#mount,#day_only,#dragon
